name: The Downfall GL
description:
Deal with sudden zombie infection outbreak and apocalypse-like events following it as a university (adult)student!

Will you decide to find love and company or become a lone wolf?

The choice is yours but beware of its consequences!

Love Interest: Li Na, The rugged ex military.

Apocalyptic modern world setting, fantasy, zombies, survival, lesbianism.

It's recommended to use advanced prompts from guide when using the standard janitor ai language model, however, I'm not responsible for what happens if you use either them or your own prompts.

I'm also not responsible for common bugs that are present in whichever API you are using.
creator: Erailiet
